papers.abstract_en: We study the quantum anomalous Hall effect in a magnetic topological material described by a Chern insulator model. Berry curvature and chiral edge states are analyzed through quantum transport calculations.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们研究了由陈绝缘体模型描述的磁性拓扑材料中的量子反常霍尔效应。通过量子输运计算分析了贝里曲率和手性边缘态。
papers.experiments_or_calculations_en: Quantum transport calculations were performed to analyze Berry curvature and chiral edge states.
papers.experiments_or_calculations_zh: 通过量子输运计算分析了贝里曲率和手性边缘态。
papers.keyword_hits_text: quantum anomalous Hall, anomalous Hall, Chern insulator, Berry curvature, chiral edge state, edge state, quantum transport
papers.main_results_en: The main results are not specified in the abstract.
papers.main_results_zh: 摘要中未明确说明主要结果。
papers.physical_system_en: Magnetic topological material described by a Chern insulator model.
papers.physical_system_zh: 由陈绝缘体模型描述的磁性拓扑材料。
papers.physics_problem_en: Studying the quantum anomalous Hall effect in a magnetic Chern insulator model.
papers.physics_problem_zh: 研究磁性陈绝缘体模型中的量子反常霍尔效应。
papers.recommended_reason_zh: 该论文直接研究量子反常霍尔效应和陈绝缘体，与凝聚态拓扑物态方向高度相关。
papers.title_en: Quantum Anomalous Hall Effect in Magnetic Chern Insulators
papers.title_zh: 磁性陈绝缘体中的量子反常霍尔效应
papers.why_relevant_en: It directly investigates quantum anomalous Hall effect and Chern insulator physics, central to topological condensed matter.
papers.why_relevant_zh: 直接研究量子反常霍尔效应和陈绝缘体物理，是拓扑凝聚态物理的核心课题。
